description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product DetailsBlack printed kurta, has a V-neck, a black panel insert at right side seam and left shoulder, short sleeves with no side slitsMaterial and CareBody 100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
